fields.description:
## Description
Duplication analyzer running jscpd (external PATH CLI, JSON reporter) -> `AnalyzerResult.duplication` (clone count + duplicated-lines %). No LLM/prompt/schema/enum is defined by this ticket (T8 not-applicable — this is a deterministic CLI adapter, no agent/reviewer/output-schema surface).

## Grounding (E4/G1G2 — verified via Grep/Read)
- CONFIRMED `grep -n "jscpd\\|statistics" scripts/backfill_complexity_clone_snapshots.py`: the existing `_measure_clone_count` shells the BARE binary `["jscpd", ...]` and reads `statistics.total.clones` from the JSON report.
- New files CREATED here: `analyzers/jscpd_dup.py`, `analyzers/_jscpd.py`. `AnalyzerResult`/`Unavailable(reason, accruing_since)` from 3b30 (depends_on). Consumer updated OUTSIDE dir: the backfill script (re-pointed at the shared helper; invocation byte-for-byte unchanged = still bare `jscpd`).

## Approach & rationale (G6/T1)
Extract the backfill jscpd runner + `statistics.total` read into `analyzers/_jscpd.run_jscpd`; both the backfill script and the new adapter call it. Rationale: one runner = no invocation drift; reuses a mature OSS CLI already integrated (no novel architecture, T1). Invocation stays BARE `jscpd` (npx explicitly out of scope) so the backfills behavior is unchanged. `accruing_since` is a module-level `_ACCRUING_SINCE` constant (matching existing reader modules), passed to `Unavailable(reason, accruing_since)`.

## Acceptance criteria (observable + proving command)
- [ ] `run_jscpd` in `analyzers/_jscpd.py` parses `statistics.total.clones` (int) + `statistics.total.percentage` (float). PROVE: `pytest -q tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py::test_parse_statistics_total`.
- [ ] Backfill + adapter share ONE runner. PROVE: `pytest -q tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py::test_single_runner_reused` (asserts both modules reference `_jscpd.run_jscpd`).
- [ ] jscpd present: `analyze(root)` on a known-clone fixture returns `.duplication.clones >= 1`. PROVE (skipif jscpd absent): `pytest -q tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py::test_live_clone -m integration`.
- [ ] jscpd ABSENT (monkeypatched runner raising FileNotFoundError): returns `Unavailable(reason, _ACCRUING_SINCE)`, not zeros, not a raise. PROVE: `pytest -q tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py::test_absent_jscpd_unavailable`.
- [ ] Backfill invocation unchanged (still bare `jscpd`). PROVE: `grep -q "\\[.\\?.jscpd" scripts/backfill_complexity_clone_snapshots.py` (no `npx` introduced).

## Dependencies: 3b30, 9597, e7a0 (recorded depends_on edges).
## Files: src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/jscpd_dup.py (new), src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/_jscpd.py (new), scripts/backfill_complexity_clone_snapshots.py (delegate), tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py (new)
## Scope: M
